road_setback_regional_m: Preferably not less than 25 m from public-road boundary (specified protected routes); in any event not less than 18 m
road_setback_local_m: General set-back 18 m from road fence on all County roads
sightline_y: 215 m (100 km/h); 160 m (80 km/h); 90 m (60 km/h); 70 m (50 km/h); 55 m (80 km/h local roads); cul-de-sac ≤3 dwellings 30 m
wastewater_standard: Rural dwellings require site assessment / percolation suitability (EPA Code of Practice; Sustainable Rural Housing Guidelines 2005)
residential_density_dph: Criteria-based, location-dependent (Section 3.2); fixed dwellings/ha figures carried in Volume 1 Core Strategy / Table 3.2
plot_ratio: Shall not generally exceed 1:2 (2.0); higher (incl. ~2.0) for General Business/enterprise/employment and Opportunity zones
separation_distance_m: 22 m between directly opposing above-ground-floor windows (reciprocal overlooking)
private_open_space: Per Table 3.2 by dwelling type; not less than 50 sq.m
public_open_space_pct: Min 15% of total site area; institutional lands min 25% (Policy H21)
trigger_FRA: Flood-risk mitigation requirements (Section 9.8); flood-zone-based controls; Justification Test in Volume 1 / SFRA
trigger_AHIA: Controls for Protected Structures and settings; works assessed against Architectural Heritage Protection Guidelines (Ch 11 of Vol 2)
trigger_TTA: Road Safety Audits for new/altered access onto National Primary/National roads; TTA per NRA/TII 2014 Guidelines (Section 8.5)
notes: Principal road frontages (business parks): building line not less than 15 m + min 5 m planted strip; Tramore/Waterford Road not less than 30 m. Rural min site area not stated as single figure. AA and statutory EIA/EIAR thresholds in Volume 1 / SEA-AA documentation, not Volume 2.
